title: Behavior of `Module::connect()` with constants is confusing
body:
The comment in the code says `// ignore all attempts to assign constants to other constants`, but the actual code does more than that. Anywhere there is a constant on the LHS, that bit connection is entirely ignored, even if there is a wire in the corresponding bit of the RHS.

I wrote a fix for that [here](https://github.com/rocallahan/yosys/commit/cd40c118d2a3989c7aa07125aae5ec34ae0f2359) but it fails tests. In particular `opt_expr_combined_assign.ys` binds a zero constant to the output of an OR gate, which then causes `check` to fail with `Warning: Drivers conflicting with a constant 1'0 driver`.

I'm not really sure how to proceed. What is the intended behavior of `Module::connect()` when the LHS is a constant and the RHS is a wire?
